The '''Blade-28 fighter''' was a combat aircraft built by [[Tarrvin-on-Kallik]] on [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]].

==History==
By [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], the Blade-28 was somewhat outdated, being outperformed in nearly every way by the newer [[Blade-32 superiority fighter]]. Nevertheless, a large numbers of Blade-28s were still in use, especially by the nations opposing [[Cartann]] and by retired [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who kept the fighters for their personal use. The most famous Blade-28 was the [[Golden Yoke]], the personal fighter of [[Perator]] [[Pekaelic ke Teldan]] of Cartann.
